title: Saying Kaddish: The Mourner's Prayer That Praises God
subtitle: The surprising content of Kaddish (no mention of death!), when and how mourners recite it, and the power of community support

header_image.description: Ancient synagogue interior with memorial plaques on the wall and morning light streaming through tall windows, creating an atmosphere of solemn beauty and community remembrance

key_concepts: Kaddish contains no mention of death
Focuses on praising and sanctifying God's name

en.title: Saying Kaddish: The Mourner's Prayer That Praises God
en.subtitle: The surprising content of Kaddish (no mention of death!), when and how mourners recite it, and the power of community support

zh.title: 诵念卡迪什：赞美上帝的哀悼者祷文
zh.subtitle: 卡迪什的惊人内容（没有提及死亡！）、哀悼者何时何地诵念，以及社群支持的力量

he.title: אמירת קדיש: תפילת האבל המשבחת את השם
he.subtitle: התוכן המפתיע של הקדיש (ללא אזכור מוות!), מתי ואיך אבלים אומרים אותו, וכוח התמיכה הקהילתית

theological_themes: Divine praise in times of loss
practical_information: Said during all three daily services

chinese_dynasties: Tang Dynasty (杜甫 - perseverance in adversity)
Song Dynasty (先天下之忧而忧 - putting others before self)
